name: mindframe
description: AI agents that learn your org and act on it.

deployment_name.title: Deployment name
deployment_name.description: Names this mindframe deployment — the client's name for a vendor install, or your own infra name for a self-hosted one. Threads into the vault root and grounding prompts.

vault_path.title: Knowledge-base vault path
vault_path.description: Filesystem path to the customer-domain knowledge base (a git repo). Deliverable skills read it at runtime as CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_VAULT_PATH. Use a fresh path, separate from any personal project-tracker vault.
